chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 86 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.8 2. For orders on CMA No.701/2019 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.702/2019 05.03.2026 Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the issue before the court is covered against the applicant department by virtue of judgment of honourable Supreme Court reported as 2023 SCMR 1972. In view hereof learned counsel states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
